category_sources: source_facts.description says cmus is a music player with an ncurses based interface.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cmus; current_curation.display-name is cmus.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official cmus site; source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub project whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/cmus/cmus, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ncurses music player; source_facts.executables lists cmus and cmus-remote.
